item.title: Extract Color Palette
item.author: Rob
item.description: Extracts a cohesive color palette from any input image and renders it as a clean, full-resolution color bar. You can choose how many colors to pull and whether each color's width reflects its visual dominance in the image or all colors are shown in equal proportions.

item.title: Seedance 2.0 + LLM Prompt Helper
item.author: enigmatic_e
item.description: This workflow uses two reference images and a simple text description to automatically generate a detailed Seedance 2.0-style prompt using an LLM. Instead of spending time figuring out complex prompting structure, the workflow analyzes your references and builds the prompt for you, making it much faster and easier to create high-quality results. The included LLM helper is designed to match the style and formatting that works well with Seedance 2.0, helping streamline the entire process while still giving you full control over the final output. Just drop in your references, describe the scene or motion you want, and the workflow handles the prompt generation automatically.

item.title: Character + Clothing Virtual Try on Studio Photoshoot
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload an image of your character and a flat lay image of your clothing items. Generate 4 fashion editorial photographs of your character in the outfit. Select which image to upscale and add back details.

item.title: 1 input multiple styles from prompt
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload an image and generate 12 stylized variations in under 15 seconds using Grok Imagine Quality.

item.title: FLUX Virtual Try-On
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Upload a person photo and a garment image. Generate a virtual try-on result with the garment applied to the person while preserving face and pose.

item.title: Ideogram v4: Text to Image
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Input a text prompt or structured JSON description. Generate an image with precise layout, color, and style control using Ideogram 4.0.

item.title: Ideogram v4: Text to Image (API)
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Input a text prompt in structured JSON format. Generate a high-quality image with precise layout control, text rendering, and color palette support.

item.title: Storyboard To Video - Seedance 2.0
item.author: enigmatic_e
item.description: Generate an 8-panel storyboard from a simple text prompt, then use that storyboard as the foundation for Seedance 2.0. The storyboard provides a visual blueprint for the sequence, allowing you to guide the video with more control over the action, camera angles, composition, and overall storytelling.

item.title: Seamless Video Transitions - LTX 2.3 FLW LoRA
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload two input videos and generate a seamless transition between the two shots.

item.title: Cinematic Bridge Video
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Generate or use a final frame, then create a cinematic transition from the input frame to the end frame.

item.title: VFX Passes to Video
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Turn one reference image into a blendable VFX keyframe with chromatic aberration, glow, lens flare, film finish, and generate a Seedance 2.0 cinematic video.

item.title: Color Curves to Video
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Build cinematic color-curve grades and generate a video from a single reference image with native Curve Editors, histogram-guided RGB curves, and a GLSL shader in Color Curves to Video.

item.title: Utility Video Upscale
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Upscale videos to sharper, higher-resolution outputs with Wan2.2, with precise control over detail, denoise strength, and sizing parameters in Utility Video Upscale.

item.title: Commerce Hero Video
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Relight a product image into a premium e-commerce hero image and short product video.

item.title: Krea 2 Moodboards
item.author: JMS
item.description: A simple Krea 2 workflow for testing and comparing different Krea moodboard styles. Each section uses a separate prompt, moodboard ID, and save node, making it easy to try multiple visual directions from one workflow. Users can bypass inactive sections, swap in their own Krea moodboard ID, adjust moodboard strength, and generate clean test outputs.

item.title: cinematic_annotate_video
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Cinematic Annotate turns one clean image into adirector-style camera-path markup, converts it into a Seedance 2.0 motion prompt, and generates a clean cinematic video from the original frame.

item.title: Anima Base v1: Text to Image
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Input a text prompt describing an anime or artistic illustration. Generate a non-photorealistic image focused on anime concepts, characters, or styles.

item.title: Krea 2: Style Reference
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Upload a style reference image and input a text prompt. Generate an image matching the prompt while applying the aesthetic style from your reference.

item.title: Krea2: Text to Image
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Input a text prompt describing your desired scene. Generate four aesthetic, high-quality images that interpret your prompt with creative variety.

item.title: One Button Transformation
item.author: enigmatic_e
item.description: Create transformation videos where a cube, sphere, capsule, or custom shape appears on a table with a button on top. A hand presses the button and the object transforms into a person, character, or item based on your reference images. The workflow automatically uses the colors and theme of your subject to generate matching first and last frames while keeping the environment and style consistent throughout the transformation. Simply provide your reference images, choose a shape, generate the frames, and feed them into Seedance to create the final animation effect. Includes support for both Seedance 2.0 for higher-quality results and Seedance 1.5 as a more affordable alternative that still produces solid results.

item.title: Restore Archival Footage - LTX 2.3 Dearchive LoRA
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload an input video or archival footage and restore it with 1 click.

item.title: Motion Collages
item.author: shanef3d
item.description: Take a video and transform it into a stop motion sequence with a style reference

item.title: Remove Watermark from Video - LTX 2.3 LoRA
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload an input video with watermarks and remove them with one click.

item.title: Remove Subtitles from Video - LTX 2.3 LoRA
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload an input video with subtitles or text occlusions and remove the text elements with one click.

item.title: Remove Object from Video - LTX 2.3 Obscura Remova LoRA
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload an input video and prompt for the object to get removed from the video's foreground.

item.title: AI on the Lot 2026_LTX-2.3_IC LoRA (Union Control)
item.author: Julien Durand | MJM
item.description: The second bonus workflow for AI on the Lot 2026, made available for ComfyUI 101 workshop attendees to open and follow along if time allows. A video editing workflow using LTX 2.3 with the Union Control IC LoRA and canny control. Provide a modified frame from your video and the workflow propagates that change across the clip. For example, take a frame from a video of a shirtless boxer, edit a red shirt onto him, and the output video will show him wearing the red shirt throughout.

item.title: AI on the Lot 2026_Qwen-Image-Edit-2511
item.author: Julien Durand | MJM
item.description: A bonus workflow for AI on the Lot 2026, made available for ComfyUI 101 workshop attendees to open and follow along if time allows. An image editing workflow powered by Qwen-Image-Edit-2511.

item.title: AI on the Lot 2026 - Final WF - t2v
item.author: Julien Durand | MJM
item.description: The sixth and final workflow released for AI on the Lot 2026, made available for ComfyUI 101 workshop attendees to open and follow along if they choose. A text-to-video workflow that brings together everything built and used in the previous workflows into one complete setup.

item.title: AI on the Lot 2026 - LTX-2.3 - i2v
item.author: Julien Durand | MJM
item.description: The fifth workflow released for AI on the Lot 2026, made available for ComfyUI 101 workshop attendees to open and follow along if they choose. An image-to-video workflow built on the LTX 2.3 model, turning a still image into a generated video clip.

item.title: AI on the Lot 2026 - QwenVL - Prompt Enhancer
item.author: Julien Durand | MJM
item.description: The fourth workflow released for AI on the Lot 2026, made available for ComfyUI 101 workshop attendees to open and follow along if they choose. A prompt enhancer powered by the Qwen VL LLM node: enter a simple prompt and get back a richer, more detailed version ready to use.

item.title: Grok Imagine Image Quality: Edit
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Enhance image quality with advanced text rendering and creative control using Grok Imagine Image Quality. Input images or prompts for improved detail and fidelity.

item.title: Grok Imagine Image Quality: Generation
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Generate enhanced images with improved details, text rendering, and

item.title: VOID: Video Inpainting
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Upload a video and mask the object you want to remove. Generate a clean video with the object and its physical interactions deleted.

item.title: Stable Audio 3.0 Medium Base
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Input a short text description of a sound, music, or effect. The workflow expands your prompt with Qwen and generates a stereo audio clip from Stable Audio 3.

item.title: 3x3 Contact Sheet
item.author: enigmatic_e
item.description: Generate a 3x3 grid of image variations from a simple prompt and reference image using Nano Banana. Pick your favorite frame from the grid, then recreate it as a standalone high-quality image while maintaining character and outfit consistency. Great for concept exploration, pose variations, camera angles, outfit ideas, and fast visual inspiration without generating each image individually.

item.title: AI on the Lot 2026 - QwenVL - i2t
item.author: Julien Durand | MJM
item.description: The third workflow released for AI on the Lot 2026, made available for ComfyUI 101 workshop attendees to open and follow along if they choose. A simple image-to-text prompt creator using Qwen VL, useful for generating prompts from reference images.

item.title: AI on the Lot 2026 - Z-Image Turbo - t2i + Upscale
item.author: Julien Durand | MJM
item.description: The second workflow released for AI on the Lot 2026, made available for ComfyUI 101 workshop attendees to open and follow along if they choose. Same text-to-image setup using Z-Image Turbo, now with an upscale step added for higher resolution output.

item.title: AI on the Lot 2026 - Z-Image Turbo - t2i
item.author: Julien Durand | MJM
item.description: The first workflow released for AI on the Lot 2026. A text-to-image workflow using Z-Image Turbo, made available for ComfyUI 101 workshop attendees to open and follow along if they choose.

item.title: Googly Eyes
item.author: Purz
item.description: LTX 2.3 LoRA that makes anyone in the input video have Googly Eyes. This workflow utilizes the Googlyeyes LTX 2.3 LoRA by TheBurgstall

item.title: Video Restoration
item.author: Purz
item.description: Using LTX 2.3 Video to Video you can restore old footage. This LoRA is great for getting details out of older archival film.

item.title: Video Outpainting
item.author: Purz
item.description: Video Outpainting using the LTX 2.3 Video Outpainting IC LoRA. Expand your video in any direction!

item.title: LTX 2.3 - Lipdub LoRA + Voice Clone
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload a driving video and prompt the desired dialogue to generate a lipdub of your video using LTX 2.3. The workflow then clones your dubbed audio back to the original character's voice using Chatterbox. It is a fully open source workflow for changing the speech of your character from a driving video.

item.title: Utility Merge Video
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Concatenate 2 videos with the Utility Merge Videos (Subgraph).

item.title: Style Transfer Vid2Vid - GPT Image 2 + Seedance 2.0
item.author: Rob
item.description: Create up to 4 style transfer video to video generations using state of the art models. This workflow creates a depth map from your input video to guide the Seedance 2.0 generation. The first frame of the video is extracted and used as reference with your style prompts using GPT-Image-2.

item.title: Seedance 2.0 - Viral Videos Character Swap
item.author: Rob
item.description: A one click workflow to recreate an input video with your character. All you need to do is upload the video and your character. This workflow uses Google Gemini LLM to analyze the input video and reverse engineer a prompt. You can prompt for specific details to inject into this analysis. The workflow extracts the first frame of the video and swaps your character into it, sends this into Seedance 2.0 Reference-to-Video and generates

item.title: Create seamless transitions with LTX 2.3
item.author: Ingi Erlingsson
item.description: Create seamless transitions between shots with this LTX 2.3 workflow, featuring the FLW LoRA from Systsms

item.title: Text Match Cut
item.author: JMS
item.description: Type a sentence and generate a Vox-style archival newspaper match-cut montage. An LLM node splits the sentence into words, GPT Imagen 2 renders each word on an aged editorial page, and the frames assemble into a video. Adjust the frame rate and repeat count to dial in the stop-motion pacing, or edit the base prompt in the Chat Config node to shift the style (magazine colour, tabloid, ransom-note, comic book, etc).

item.title: Seedance 2.0 Cinematic Prompt Studio
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Create production-ready cinematic shots with concise, director-style Seedance 2.0 prompts built around intentional camera motion, visual storytelling, and strong final frames.

item.title: VFX - Bullet Time Effect
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Upload an image or describe a scene, then get **one optimized prompt** built to reproduce the bullet time effect: **frozen action, slow-motion energy, and a cinematic camera orbit around the subject**.

item.title: Branded Comfy Thumbnail
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Generate Thumbnails with your brand guidelines as references.

item.title: Dynamic Motion Design
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Create polished motion design videos with Seedance-ready prompts.

item.title: Seedance 2.0 - Extend Video
item.author: Rob
item.description: Uses Seedance 2.0 to seamlessly extend an input video. Enter your prompt for the video that occurs immediately following the driving input video. This workflow detects which frame is the most seamless and allows you to select to trim from that frame.

item.title: Seedance 2.0 - Viral Cinemagraph Effect
item.author: Rob
item.description: A one click workflow to generate a viral cinemagraph frame effect using Seedance 2.0. Upload an image of your character, optionally describe the motion of the scene and click generate. This workflow bypasses the realistic human input ban/limitation. A cinemagraph is a hybrid of a still photo and video, where a static image features a subtle, repeating, and seamless motion.

item.title: Image → Song → Audio-Reactive Video
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Create songs with ACE Step 1.5 XL and audio-reactive videos with LTX 2.3 and the Audio-Reactive LoRA.

item.title: LTX 2.3 Audio-Reactive LoRA
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Create audio-reactive videos with LTX 2.3 and the Audio-Reactive LoRA.

item.title: Seedance 2.0 + LLM Prompt Helper
item.author: enigmatic_e
item.description: This workflow uses two reference images and a simple text description to automatically generate a detailed Seedance 2.0-style prompt using an LLM. Instead of spending time figuring out complex prompting structure, the workflow analyzes your references and builds the prompt for you, making it much faster and easier to create high-quality results. The included LLM helper is designed to match the style and formatting that works well with Seedance 2.0, helping streamline the entire process while still giving you full control over the final output. Just drop in your references, describe the scene or motion you want, and the workflow handles the prompt generation automatically.

item.title: Stylize Video - Frame by Frame - Flux.2 Klein 4b
item.author: Rob
item.description: Create a stylized frame by frame effect on your input video by using Flux.2 Klein 4b Distilled image editing model.

item.title: VFX Utilities
item.author: Doug Hogan
item.description: Generate production-ready VFX utility passes from any image or plate in seconds. This workflow creates alphas, depth, and normal maps using prompt-based and point-based segmentation, giving you the core tools for relighting, compositing, and look development without needing a full CG render.

item.title: Outpaint to Any Aspect Ratio - Nano Banana Pro
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload your image, input your desired aspect ratio and the images position (as a percentage) in the new aspect ratio composite. Uses Nano Banana Pro to generate an outpainted version of your image to fit the new dimensions.

item.title: 1 image input Split Stack - Nano Banana 2 + Kling 3.0
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload 1 input image and generate 5 alternate angles to be used as start frames with Kling 3.0. Each video is stacked horizontally in a final 9x16 video.

item.title: Generate Talking-Head Videos
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Bring voice consistency to your open source video generation pipeline with Qwen 3 TTS and LTX 2.3 with the Talkvid ID-LoRA.

item.title: LTX 2.3 Cameraman IC-LoRA
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Create camera-motion-driven videos with LTX 2.3 and the IC-LoRA Cameraman model.

item.title: Ohneis - Product Workflow
item.author: Ohneis652

item.title: LTX 2.3 - Cozy Felt
item.author: Purz
item.description: Stylized text-to-video generation using VRGameDevGirl84's LTX 2.3 LoRAs + Workflow, adapted to run on Comfy Cloud. Creates adorable felt worlds and characters.

item.title: SYSTMS ACTION: QWEN IMAGE EDIT 2511
item.author: Ingi Erlingsson
item.description: Turn just about anything into a toy with the ACTION Qwen Image Edit 2511 LoRA! Simply upload an image and prompt it by writing "action the [subject]"!

item.title: Comfy for Advertising - OOH Visualization
item.author: shanef3d

item.title: Comfy for Advertising - B-Roll Creation
item.author: shanef3d

item.title: Comfy for Advertising - Talent Casting
item.author: shanef3d

item.title: Comfy for Advertising - Product Photography
item.author: shanef3d

item.title: Comfy for Advertising - Storyboard Creation
item.author: shanef3d

item.title: Comfy for Advertising - Moodboard Creation
item.author: shanef3d

item.title: Quick Ideate to Storyboard to Animated Video (GPT Image 2 + Seedance 2.0)
item.author: Minta
item.description: A quick upload of your animated character reference art and description of the scene unlocks a super fast ideation sessions with GPT Image 2 and Seedance 2.0. Great for content on the go.

item.title: Graphic Design Recomposer
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload a graphic design and select your desired aspect ratio. This workflow generates and recomposes the graphic to fit the new aspect ratio.

item.title: Graphic Color Remixer
item.author: Rob
item.description: Upload a graphic and generate 4, 9 or 16 unique variations in your desired vibe and color palette with a single Nano Banana Pro generation.

item.title: LTX 2.3_ID_lora_CelebVHQ
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Bring voice consistency to your open source video generation pipeline with Qwen 3 TTS and LTX 2.3 with the CelebHVQ ID-LoRA.

item.title: Adjustment Frame Workflow
item.author: Doug Hogan
item.description: A Director-style AI workflow that generates a shot, refines camera angle, and produces multiple video takes across top models so you can quickly choose the best result.

item.title: SAM3 - Video Masking via Text Prompts
item.author: Purz
item.description: SAM 3 lets you mask objects in a video just by typing a short phrase like "red car" or "person" — no frame-by-frame rotoscoping. It finds every matching instance, tracks them across frames with stable IDs, and outputs per-frame masks ready for compositing, blurring, or replacement.

item.title: SAM3 - Video Masking via Text Prompt
item.author: Purz
item.description: SAM 3 lets you mask objects in a video just by typing a short phrase like "red car" or "person" — no frame-by-frame rotoscoping. It finds every matching instance, tracks them across frames with stable IDs, and outputs per-frame masks ready for compositing, blurring, or replacement.

item.title: Seedance2.0 Real Human: FLF2V
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Upload a reference image of a real person for identity verification and generate a personalized video with first and last frame control using Seedance2.0 FLF2V.

item.title: Seedance2.0 Real Human: Image to Video
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Upload a reference video of a real person for identity verification. Use your own photo to validate and generate a personalized video output.

item.title: Seedance 2.0 Image to Video
item.author: Minta
item.description: This workflow is an easy start for generating 4-15 second videos from a single image, using Seedance 2.0

item.title: Z-Image-Turbo_Oldschool-Hud-Graphics
item.author: Sirolim
item.description: Create Oldschool Hud Graphics with a LoRA and Z-Image Turbo. Use a LoRA to create unique styles, characters or looks.

item.title: Panoramic Image Generation
item.author: nwalmolos
item.description: Upload an image to generate a panoramic image using Nano Banana/GPT Image 2.

item.title: Refocus LTX 2.3 IC LoRA
item.author: enigmatic_e
item.description: The Refocus IC LoRA for LTX 2.3 makes it possible to bring slightly out-of-focus footage back into clarity. Even in more extreme cases, it can recover detail that would typically be lost, opening up new possibilities for salvaging footage that would otherwise go unused.

item.title: LTX 2.3 - EditAnything - Video Editing via Prompt
item.author: Purz
item.description: This experimental workflow uses an IC LoRA to attempt to Add, Remove, Change, or Convert elements of a video. For example, you can add a dog to a scene, or change the art style.

item.title: SAM3 - Remove Background via Prompt
item.author: Purz
item.description: Isolate any subject from an image using a text prompt — just type what you want to keep (e.g. `character`, `dog`, `car`) and the workflow cuts it out and saves it as a PNG with a transparent background.

item.title: Qwen Image Layer Decomp for Illustration v1
item.author: Minta
item.description: Workflow example for using Qwen Image layer decomposition tools to help separate layers in a scene.

item.title: Quick Animatic Boards
item.author: Minta
item.description: Quickly iterate on animatic or hero keyframe boards driven by your own art.

item.title: Seedance 2.0 Multiframe Stitch
item.author: Minta
item.description: This workflow uses a lot of credits! This workflow allows you to create a stitched multiframe video using seedance 2.0. Great of iterating and inbetweening quickly.

item.title: Qwen Image Edit for Illustration v 1.0
item.author: Minta
item.description: This workflow leverages Qwen Edit with a finetuned illustration LoRA for better illustrated content editing.

item.title: Relight and Environment Merge
item.author: Minta
item.description: Using a combination of illustration LoRA and relight LoRA, this workflow allows you to properly light illustrated characters in a keyframe.

item.title: Seedance 2.0 Reference to Video - Concept Art + Stop Motion Style
item.author: Minta
item.description: A useful prompt and example images for generating stop motion style shorts with concept art.

item.title: Seedance Playblast2Render
item.author: Doug Hogan
item.description: This workflow turns a raw CG playblast into a final rendered shot using Seedance 2.0. It preserves your animation and camera from the playblast, while Nano Banana Pro generates reference images and multi-angle grids to define asset look and improve consistency. A custom Gemini node builds structured prompts, allowing Seedance to reinterpret the shot with a controlled, production-ready style. The result is a fast, repeatable pipeline that replaces traditional rendering with AI-driven output while keeping full control over motion and intent.

item.title: LTX 2.3 - Anime2Real
item.author: Purz
item.description: This experimental workflow will take Anime characters and try to make them realistic using an LTX 2.3 IC LoRA trained by Alisson Pereira.

item.title: Video Face Swap - LTX2.3 Lora
item.author: Rob
item.description: The best open source video face swap workflow. This LTX2.3 lora was trained by @Alissonerdx.

item.title: Apply Color Grade from Reference Image
item.author: Rob
item.description: The easiest way to match color grades between your images. Upload a target image and a reference image that has the desired colors and use Nano Banana 2 to extract and apply it onto the target image.

item.title: Seedance 2.0: Text to Video
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Generate cinematic videos from text prompts with synchronized audio, controlled camera motion, and stable visuals. Input text descriptions to output high-quality video sequences.

item.title: Seedance 2.0: Reference to Video
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Generate cinematic videos from reference images and text prompts. Preserve subject identity and composition while adding expressive motion with synchronized audio. Control camera movement and lighting through detailed prompts.

item.title: Seedance2.0: First-Last-Frame to Video
item.author: ComfyUI
item.description: Upload the first and last frames of your video. Generate a high-quality video sequence using the Seedance2.0 model.

item.title: Face Swap Workflow
item.author: Doug Hogan
item.description: A ComfyUI workflow for de-aging and/or face replacements that combines AI-driven masking, reference-based identity transfer, and inpainting to produce natural, temporally consistent results. Designed for VFX use, it allows artists to quickly swap or rejuvenate faces while preserving performance, lighting, and integration with the original plate.
